flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Nunez Community College rose 53% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.5k → $13.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Nunez Community College rose 417% between 2006 and 2009 (4.1% → 21.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nunez Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Nunez Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (45.9% → 52.4%).
